channel.title: electronic instrument on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist
channel.description: Recent content in electronic instrument on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist

item.title: HarpEK: The Continuous Gesture Instrument Reaches Maturity
item.description: HarpEK: The Continuous Gesture Instrument Reaches Maturity After months of design, testing and adjustments, HarpEK reaches a decisive milestone: almost all critical hardware is validated and documented. The instrument takes shape, along with a renewed vision of gestural control in electronic music. 3D modeling of the HarpEK enclosure with ultrasonic sensors, encoders and joystick 🎛️ Validated Hardware Architecture Platform and Power Supply The system’s core relies on a fully operational ESP32-S3 DevKitC:
